Alien Marker.description: Potent and flavorful, with waves of gassy fuel, exotic fruits, and grape candy, rounded out by delicate floral undertones

Applescotti.description: Baked apple and orchard fruit over sweet dough and gentle spice, with cookie dough, vanilla, and almond biscotti notes, finishing with warm spice and subtle cedar

Beach Cooler.description: Fuel forward terpene profile and cake to cookie dough undertones

Blue Andeze.cross: Thin Mint GSC x DJ Short Blueberry
Blue Andeze.description: A loud, unique candy-forward aroma with blueberry mint notes. The Thin Mint lineage adds a sweet dessert-like flavor, while the blueberry influence rounds out a perfectly balanced, crave-worthy profile

Candy Fumez x Grape Gas.description: Sharp menthol gas with earthy diesel, creamy funk, and a smooth, pungent finish

Cape White Shark.cross: Wedding Cake x E85 x Kush Mints
Cape White Shark.description: Earthy funk and gas with sweet vanilla tones

Double Runtz.description: Potent and flavorful, with waves of gassy fuel, exotic fruits, and grape candy, rounded out by delicate floral undertones

Galactic Banana.cross: Baby Yoda x (Banana Cream Cake x Jealousy)
Galactic Banana.description: Ripe banana cream with tropical citrus and earthy gas, delivering a balanced, relaxing high

Heir Heads.description: Delivers bright aromas of sweet tropical candy layered with a touch of spicy herbs and gas

Lemon Cherry Sherbert.description: Sweet cherry and tangy lemon flavors blend into a smooth, creamy sherbet finish. The aroma mirrors the taste, with bright citrus, cherry notes, and a subtle earthy undertone

Lemon Durbscotti.cross: Super Lemon Haze x Durban Biscotti
Lemon Durbscotti.description: Sweet, tart citrus flavors meet with gassy/skunk back end

Lions Breath.cross: Lemon Cherry Tartz x Purple Milk
Lions Breath.description: Pungent citronella tones with a bit of sweet berry candy

Purple Push Pop.cross: (Ice Cream Cake x Sunset Sherbert) x Jealousy
Purple Push Pop.description: Exploding with classic Cookies terpenes, this strain layers creamy vanilla and soft citrus over a savory, kushy finish for a perfectly balanced, flavorful experience

Super Runtz.cross: Super Lemon Cherry Gelato x Runtz
Super Runtz.description: Sweet, fruity, and citrus notes with hints of pear and floral undertones

Zowah.description: Bursting with a bold sour fruit aroma, followed by sweet, candy-like Zkittles terpenes on the finish

Astro Candy.cross: Purple Push Pop + Alien Marker + Galactic Banana
